subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Render praise unto Him Who is the Purpose of all worlds, in that He hath delivered thee from the Shí'ih faction and from whatsoever they possess, through the gate of His chosen ones' utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد حمد کن مقصود عالمیان را که ترا از حزب شیعه و ما عندهم باب بیان اولیایش
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @rejection, opposition and persecution
